Strays (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,988,885Details
International Box Office $11,994,734
Worldwide Box Office $35,983,619
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,033,153
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $854,558
Total $1,887,711
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Reggie, a naïve, relentlessly optimistic Border Terrier, is abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, Reggie is certain that his beloved owner would never leave him on purpose. But once Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier named Bug, a stray who loves his freedom and believes that owners are for suckers, Reggie finally realizes he was in a toxic relationship and begins to see Doug for the heartless sleazeball that he is.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,247,810 (34.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.91 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$46,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,223 opening theaters/3,232 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,225,505

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 18th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: August 4th, 2023 (Wide) (Ukraine)
August 4th, 2023 (Wide), released as Strays (Кудлаті перці) (Russia (CIS))
August 17th, 2023 (Wide) (Israel)
August 17th, 2023 (Wide), released as Vocasy na tripu (Czech Republic)
August 17th, 2023 (Wide), released as Kivert kutyák (Hungary)
Video Release: September 5th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, crude and sexual content, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2751 (cert #54037), 9/28/2022)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Georgia, United States
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Revenge, Talking Animals
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Picturestart
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When Reggie, a naïve, relentlessly optimistic Border Terrier, is abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, Reggie is certain that his beloved owner would never leave him on purpose. But once Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier named Bug, a stray who loves his freedom and believes that owners are for suckers, Reggie finally realizes he was in a toxic relationship and begins to see Doug for the heartless sleazeball that he is.
